behavior_summary: Provides a continuous-water area effect: when an actor/trigger enters a designated fast-area the script (unless globally disabled) starts a background conversion/animation process that replaces certain static items in the area with animated water/splash items and drives per-item animation until completion.

U8P_CONTWATR::enterFastArea is the entry point that guards startup with a global restart guard (reStartedFall) and a global disable flag (hydrosFree). When allowed it marks the guard and spawns an area-scanner/initializer.

The area-scanner (U8P_CONTWATR::02C9) enumerates items in the area, records their coordinates, destroys originals, creates replacement water-animation items, pops them into the world and attaches a short-lived per-item updater (U8P_CONTWATR::0249) to each created item.

The per-item updater (U8P_CONTWATR::0249) watches an item's animation frame and — on a start frame — spawns the full per-item animator (U8P_CONTWATR::00E7) exactly once for that item; it also advances frames and triggers timed cleanup jobs as items finish.

The animator (U8P_CONTWATR::00E7) creates additional ephemeral items at offsets, pops them into the world, steps through animation frames while repeatedly spawning short cleanup jobs (FREE::1C19), and sets a one-time global flag (doneKeepFallEnd) when a terminal frame condition is reached.

On fast-area exit (U8P_CONTWATR::leaveFastArea) the script clears the restart guard (reStartedFall = 0), plays a sound/music cue (playMusic(0x66)), and invokes an external cleanup/free routine (FREE::2A56) on the area data.
notable_control_flow: U8P_CONTWATR::enterFastArea immediately returns if global hydrosFree is non-zero (global disable).

U8P_CONTWATR::enterFastArea checks global reStartedFall; it only spawns the initializer U8P_CONTWATR::02C9 if reStartedFall == 0 and then sets reStartedFall = 1 to prevent duplicate spawns while the effect is active.

U8P_CONTWATR::02C9 loops over area contents and for each matched item does: record coords -> Item::destroy(original) -> Item::create(new water item) -> Item::pop(new, coords) -> spawn U8P_CONTWATR::0249(new).

U8P_CONTWATR::0249 conditionally spawns U8P_CONTWATR::00E7 when a specific start frame is observed (guarded by a per-instance byte) and otherwise advances frames toward a terminal frame, spawning FREE::1C19 as items reach or pass specific frames.

U8P_CONTWATR::00E7 runs a per-item animation loop: create/pop ephemeral items at offsets, step frames using Item::setFrame/getFrame, spawn FREE::1C19 periodically, and set doneKeepFallEnd = 1 once on a particular terminal condition.
open_questions: Exact item type IDs and shape predicates used by U8P_CONTWATR::02C9 to select and replace area items are not explicit; the precise visual types of replacement items are inferred from create/pop patterns.
Precise semantics and timing of FREE::1C19 and FREE::2A56 (their internal behavior and lifetime) are external to the script and only inferred from usage.
The visual/aural effect intended by playMusic(0x66) on leaveFastArea is known to be a cue but the player-facing meaning (music vs short sound) is not explicit.
Whether multiple distinct animator instances interact via doneKeepFallEnd (beyond setting it once) and the intended global gameplay implication of doneKeepFallEnd is inferred but not fully certain.

main_function.name: U8P_CONTWATR::enterFastArea
main_function.purpose: Start the continuous-water initialization for the area when an actor enters the fast-area trigger, unless globally disabled or already started. Spawn the area scanner/initializer and set a restart guard to prevent duplicate starts.
entry_conditions: Event: fast-area entry (the function is invoked on area/trigger entry).
Global hydrosFree must be zero (if non-zero the function returns immediately).
If global reStartedFall == 0 then the function proceeds to set reStartedFall = 1 and spawn U8P_CONTWATR::02C9 with the area item reference parameter.

function_map.name: U8P_CONTWATR::enterFastArea
function_map.role: Area entry handler that guards and spawns the area-scanner; sets the global restart guard.

function_map.name: U8P_CONTWATR::leaveFastArea
function_map.role: Area exit handler that clears the restart guard, plays an audio cue (playMusic(0x66)), and invokes area cleanup (FREE::2A56).

function_map.name: U8P_CONTWATR::00E7
function_map.role: Per-item animator/particle controller: creates ephemeral items, drives frame animation, spawns timed cleanup jobs (FREE::1C19), and sets a one-time end flag (doneKeepFallEnd).

function_map.name: U8P_CONTWATR::0249
function_map.role: Short-lived per-item updater/frame watcher: detects start frames to spawn the animator (U8P_CONTWATR::00E7) once per item and advances/finishes item frames, spawning cleanup jobs as frames complete.

function_map.name: U8P_CONTWATR::02C9
function_map.role: Area scanner / item converter: enumerates items in the area, destroys originals, creates and pops replacement water-animation items, and spawns per-item updaters (U8P_CONTWATR::0249).

internal_calls.purpose: Spawn the area scanner/initializer to convert area items into animated water items when the area is entered.
Spawn a per-item updater for each newly-created water item so the item animation is advanced and the animator can be started later.
Start the full per-item animator exactly once when a created item's frame reaches a specific start frame (guarded by a per-instance byte).

external_calls.purpose: Play an audio cue (called with 0x66) when the area is left.
Invoke external cleanup/free routine on the area/object when leaving the area.
Spawn short-lived cleanup/timer jobs while animating an item; used repeatedly during the animation loop.
Spawn a cleanup/timer job as items reach terminal frames during per-item update.
Remove original static items from the area before creating replacement animated water items.
Create new animated water/splash items to replace destroyed originals.
Place the newly-created water items into the world at recorded coordinates.
Create ephemeral temporary items used during animation (e.g., splashes) at offsets from the main item.
Place ephemeral animation items at computed offsets from the animated item.
Read the animated item's coordinates to compute offsets for ephemeral items.
Read and change item frames to detect start conditions and advance animations toward completion.

reads.name: hydrosFree
reads.likely_effect: A global disable: when non-zero, U8P_CONTWATR::enterFastArea returns immediately and no initialization/spawn occurs.

reads.name: reStartedFall
reads.likely_effect: A global restart guard read to decide whether to spawn the area-scanner; combined with writes it functions as a global restart guard preventing duplicate startups.

reads.name: doneKeepFallEnd
reads.likely_effect: Read by the animator to gate a one-time end-of-animation action; its exact gameplay semantics are inferred (marks that an end action was performed).

writes.name: reStartedFall
writes.likely_effect: Set to 1 by U8P_CONTWATR::enterFastArea when starting the background process and cleared to 0 by U8P_CONTWATR::leaveFastArea on exit — acts as a global restart guard.

writes.name: doneKeepFallEnd
writes.likely_effect: Set to 1 by U8P_CONTWATR::00E7 when a particular terminal frame condition is reached, preventing repetition of that end-of-animation action.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Provides a continuous-water area effect: when an actor/trigger enters a designated fast-area the script (unless globally disabled) starts a background conversion/animation process that replaces certain static items in the area with animated water/splash items and drives per-item animation until completion.
